## Summary

- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make coverage`
- [ ] `make build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] I updated docs if usage changed.
- [ ] I added a changelog entry when appropriate.
